name: Asparagus Mozarella Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 10-inch quiche pan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Cut asparagus into 2-inch pieces.
3. Steam the asparagus until tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Cool and chop the asparagus.
5. Puree cottage cheese, Mozzarella, onion, parsley, egg, egg whites, and mustard in a processor.
6. Fold in chopped asparagus.
7. Pour into prepared quiche pan.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan.
9. Bake in a preheated 325-degree oven for 1 hour or until set.
10. Serves 8.
